subject: feat(pwa): auto-generate meta theme-color hex from DaisyUI oklch
body:
DaisyUI uses oklch colors internally, which can't be used directly in
<meta name="theme-color">. Added a build script that reads DaisyUI's
theme objects, converts oklch to hex, and updates both daisyuiThemes.js
and the inline flash-prevention script in index.html.

The inline script now also updates meta theme-color before first paint,
closing the gap where the address bar showed a stale color until React
mounted.

Tags: pwa, themes, build, meta
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-theming
Semver: minor

title: auto-generate meta theme-color hex from DaisyUI oklch
